rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY ROCCA VS. AUDREY EASHMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 12, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANTs FISHER REALTOR, INC. and CLARA KATES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 4th, 8th and 9th causes of action. After being given an opportunity to allege a contractual relationship and a fiduciary relationship with the moving defendants, plaintiff failed to do so. First Amended Complaint fails to allege facts re: breach of contractual warranty and breach of fiduciary duty. Additionally, as to the 9th cause of action, Plaintiff alleges that moving defendants disclosed the facts obtained via visual inspection (shared pictures), i.e. discharged duty imposed by CC 2079. Demurrer is overruled as to the first cause of action as it is not alleged against the moving defendants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GIGI ELLIS VS. JUNYING YU et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 12, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT JUNYING YU's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Transferred to Department 302 to be heard on September 17, 2014 per the order of the Presiding Judge. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MAYFIELD et al VS. BALDWIN FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Second Amended Complaint To Add Similarly Situated Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 12, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFFs ANDREA MAYFIELD, SELWYN GAUSE, CEDRICK MAYFIELD, LARRY BROWN, ALICIA ROGERS, JANA HUISKEN, CHRISTOPHER ASHE, DESIREE HARRIS, KURT EDWARDS, LUTRECE DAVIS, ALLENA KEELE, IRMATINE BOLDS, DENNIS WOLFE, BRANDON JEREZ and PAUL GALINDO's Motion To File Second Amended Complaint To Add Similarly Situated Plaintiffs GRANTED in part; and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to the request as similarly situated Plaintiffs (paragraphs 9 to 22). Motion to add a new defendant is denied; this request is not identified in the notice and is not supported by points and authorities. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANA EDITH CONTRERAS et al VS. D'ANDRE WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File X-Complaint Against Third-Party Jamal Harris And Carl Harris
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 12, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT D'ANDRE WHITE's Motion For Leave To File X-Complaint Against Third-Party Jamal Harris And Carl Harris GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 12, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANTs STEVEN MINISINI and JENNIFER CHOW's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support malice. Whether the alleged acts are despicable and carried on with willful disregard of plaintiffs' rights is an issue of fact. = (501/REQ)
